function W(W)return m[W-(-318304-(-345382))]end for W,n in ipairs({{-136503+136504;201859-201577};{-724179-(-724180),646530+-646396},{477620+-477485,-907059+907341}})do while n[-687357-(-687358)]<n[220492-220490]do do local W=type local Z=function(Z,S)return n(m,{Z;S},W,i)end return Z end,function(m,W)local i=Y(W)local Z=function(Z,S,T)return n(m,{Z,S,T},W,i)end return Z end,function(m)local
